creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
On Sat, 29 Sep 2007, Remko Lodder wrote:

> Hello, can you do some debugging on the core dump? This might tell us
> what is going on more specifically.

speedy% gdb /usr/sbin/ntpd ntpd.core
